free_text: Determination of the cross sections of (n,x) nuclear
reactions on Y, La, Ta, Pb and Bi at the energy of
Energy resolution 3 keV at 1332 keV for gamma
Energy resolution 0.7 keV at 122 keV for gamma
Metal foils of natural Y,La,Ta,Pb,Bi were examined on
purity by X-ray fluorescent analysis and by neutron
En=14.5 MeV:  Diameter 15 mm, thickness 0.1-2 mm.
En=13-14 MeV: Diameter 30 mm, thickness 0.1-0.8 mm.

Experimental data published in Zbirnik Nauk.Inst.Yad.
Doslidzhen 2(4) p53 (2001) were corrected by author
taking into account revised average neutron energies,
width of neutron spectrum and the effect of gamma-ray
was replaced by 37-RB-86 in REACTION in Sub. 013.
